nl_query: How many courses for active exam that have scans completed & board formed but evaluation assignment pending?
failed_sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT exam_student_mapping.course_id) AS pending_count
FROM exam_student_mapping
JOIN exam_schedule_cache ON exam_schedule_cache.exam_id = exam_student_mapping.exam_id
JOIN answer_script ON answer_script.exam_id = exam_schedule_cache.exam_id
JOIN script_assignment ON script_assignment.script_id = answer_script.id
WHERE exam_student_mapping.eligibility_status = 'ELIGIBLE'
  AND exam_schedule_cache.exam_date >= '2023-01-01'
  AND exam_schedule_cache.exam_date <= '2023-12-31'
  AND answer_script.scan_status = 'SCANNED'
  AND script_assignment.is_active = TRUE
  AND script_assignment.attempt_type = 'PRIMARY'
  AND script_assignment.evaluation_status = 'NOT_ASSIGNED'
